# Aaron Tamte

> AI/ML Engineer — Boston, MA

## About

Aaron Tamte is an AI/ML engineer pursuing an MS in AI at Northeastern University (GPA 3.83). He builds agent systems and ML infrastructure. Previously a data scientist at Highwire Games where he built graph neural networks over 60M+ user profiles and end-to-end ML pipelines processing 1.6TB+ of data.

## Links

- Homepage: https://aarontamte.com
- Experience: https://aarontamte.com/experience
- Projects: https://aarontamte.com/projects
- Blog: https://aarontamte.com/blog
- Documents: https://aarontamte.com/documents
- GitHub: https://github.com/Aatamte
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/aarontamte

## Projects

- SheetOS (https://sheetos.ai): AI-powered data platform with custom agentic framework in Go, multi-turn reasoning, 40+ context modules, reactive automations
- SLM-RL Search (https://github.com/Aatamte/SLM-RL-Search): RL-trained 4B parameter model for agentic code-based retrieval, 3.7x improvement over baseline
- Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration: Fine-tuned LLaMA-3 8B with LoRA, 85% success rate across 7 coordination environments
- PyCxsim (https://github.com/Aatamte/PyCxsim): Open-source Python framework for simulating autonomous agents
